{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "kodareef5", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/261977334?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kodareef5", "id": 261977334, "login": "kodareef5", "node_id": "U_kgDOD5109g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41263", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-208"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-208", "name": "Observable Timing Discrepancy"}], "description": "## Summary

There is a timing side-channel vulnerability in Traefik's BasicAuth middleware that allows an attacker to enumerate valid usernames through response-time differences.

The variable intended to hold a constant-time fallback secret always resolves to an empty string, causing the constant-time comparison to short-circuit in microseconds rather than performing a full bcrypt evaluation. This restores the original timing oracle and makes it possible to distinguish existing users from non-existing ones by measuring authentication response times.

## Patches

- https://github.com/traefik/traefik/releases/tag/v2.11.43
- https://github.com/traefik/traefik/releases/tag/v3.6.14
- https://github.com/traefik/traefik/releases/tag/v3.7.0-rc.2

## For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, please [open an issue](https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues).

<details>
<summary>Original Description</summary>

# BasicAuth Timing Regression: CVE-2026-32595 Fix Is a No-Op Due to Map Key/Value Confusion

## TL;DR

The patch for CVE-2026-32595 is a no-op. Line 49 of `basic_auth.go` has a
map key/value confusion that makes `notFoundSecret` always `""`. The
"constant time" fallback calls `goauth.CheckSecret(password, "")`, which
fast-fails in ~1us instead of running bcrypt (~60ms).

## Evidence (HEAD `786f7192e`, 2026-04-09)

Black-box PoC against live traefik binary on port 28080:

| bucket                       | n   | median   | min      |
|------------------------------|-----|----------|----------|
| existing user (wrong pw)     | 240 | 62.85 ms | 57.54 ms |
| nonexistent user (wrong pw)  | 400 |  0.48 ms |  0.35 ms |

Median ratio: **130.4x**. Classification: **8/8 correct**.

Go in-tree test: `goauth.CheckSecret` direct ratio **12,746x**.

## Root cause (4-step trace)

1. `basic_auth.go:49`: `users[slices.Collect(maps.Values(users))[0]]` -- looks
   up a hash as a username key, returns `""`.
2. `basic_auth.go:119-120`: calls `goauth.CheckSecret(password, "")`.
3. `go-http-auth/basic.go:87`: empty string matches no prefix, falls to default
   `compareMD5HashAndPassword`.
4. `basic.go:107-109`: `bytes.SplitN("", "$", 4)` returns length 1, function
   returns instantly.

## Files

- `poc/exploit.py` -- black-box Python timing oracle
- `poc/basic_auth_timing_regression_test.go` -- Go in-tree test
- `poc/traefik.yml` + `poc/dynamic.yml` -- traefik config
- `poc/live_http_poc_output_head.txt` -- verbatim PoC output on HEAD


Koda Reef

</details>", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6x2q-h3cr-8j2h", "html_url": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik/security/advisories/GHSA-6x2q-h3cr-8j2h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6x2q-h3cr-8j2h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41263"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-04-24T10:16:47Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6430748?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/nmengin", "id": 6430748, "login": "nmengin", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY0MzA3NDg=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/nmengin", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "BasicAuth middleware: timing side-channel vulnerability", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T10:16:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/traefik/traefik/security-advisories/GHSA-6x2q-h3cr-8j2h", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "Traefik"}, "patched_versions": "v2.11.43, v3.6.14, v3.7.0-rc.2", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= v2.11.42, <= v3.6.13, <= v3.7.0-rc.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: BasicAuth middleware: timing side-channel vulnerability
